drivers: Iran ceasefire uncertainty
narrative: Strongly negative European peers drove a clear bearish signal. DAX fell 1.15% and CAC dropped 1.12% on Iran ceasefire uncertainty. OMX30 traded below both moving averages with MACD in negative territory. Direction correct at -0.26% vs predicted -0.47% — the 50-MA near 3,185 provided partial support.

sectorImpacts.reason: European industrial bellwethers all fell on geopolitical uncertainty. Trade exposure adds risk.
Defensive rotation on risk-off day. AstraZeneca outperformed index.
